prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-SSDESWCT-SML-CHRM Product Type: PALETTE_PUTTY_KNIFE Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Universal Tool Stainless Steel Double Ended Carving Spatula Hobby Pottery Tools Art Supplies, 6.5 Inch Description: The double ended spatula carving tool is constructed of durable stainless steel and makes a great addition to your collection of pottery and hobby tools! At just 6.5 inches in length, these tools are the perfect size for precision work on tiny objects, particularly when working with soft mediums.

This carving spatula tool comes with a durable PVC pouch for protection and easy storage while not in use. Each tool features a grip so you'll be able to hold on to it with ease. Make sure to grab this spatula before your next craft or hobby precision project! Search Terms: wax carving pottery hobby tools scrapbooking painting crafting art supplies metal spatula adult hobby kits ceramics jewelry design arts and crafts Features: - POTTERY TOOLS: Double ended carving tool ideal for working with soft mediums - DOUBLE ENDED: Flat spatula ends for carving and precision work - MATERIAL: Stainless Steel - WEIGHT: 0.1lbs - LENGTH: 6 inches === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
